spectrum-actionbutton-edge-to-visual-onl.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ActionButton`.
Used by `.spectrum-ActionButton`, `.spectrum-ActionButton-icon`, `.spectrum-ActionButton-hold + .spectrum-ActionButton-icon, .spectrum-ActionButton-icon:only-child`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-actionbutton-edge-to-visual-only, calc(var(--spectrum-actionbutton-sized-edge-to-visual-only) - var(--spectrum-actionbutton-border-width)))`, if not set.

spectrum-logical-rotation.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ActionButton:dir(rtl), [dir="rtl"] .spectrum-ActionButton`.
Used by `.spectrum-ActionButton-hold`.
Defaults to `matrix(-1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)`, if not set.
